# CompaniesIQ

> Evidence-based UK business intelligence built from the public register. Every
> figure is sourced and dated — from Companies House (live), the ONS, and Nomis.
> Educational and neutral; not financial advice.

CompaniesIQ turns the UK public business register into searchable, trustworthy
market intelligence: 5.5M+ live companies with industry, regional, survival and
formation data. Used by investors, analysts, consultants, accountants,
researchers, agencies and business owners.

## Data sources (all cited in-product)
- Companies House — company registrations, SIC codes, incorporation dates, status, type, location, officers, filings, charges, PSCs (live, Open Government Licence).
- ONS — business survival rates, industry growth, business population estimates (reference baselines).
- Nomis — regional employment, population, economic activity, median pay (live).
- Google Places — optional web-presence enrichment (website, Google Business Profile, reviews), shown only when a confident match exists, otherwise "Not Assessed".

## Principles
- Factual and source-backed only. No revenue estimates, AI success predictions, hot/warm/cold or lead scores.
- Unknown values are shown as "Not Assessed", never assumed.

## Key pages
- Home: https://companiesiq.co.uk/
- Pricing: https://companiesiq.co.uk/pricing
- Sources & methodology: https://companiesiq.co.uk/sources
- Company report: https://companiesiq.co.uk/app/company/{company_number}
- Industry intelligence: https://companiesiq.co.uk/app/industries/{sector}
